title: calibrachoa synanthera
intro: Calibrachoa synanthera, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant that is native to South America and is a member of the Solanaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and potentially lowering blood pressure due to its flavonoid content. Calibrachoa synanthera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
